title: Unclear where to set Zoom level
author: rohrkemper
body_snippet: I'm working sometimes on a 4K monitor and sometimes on a 5K 2K monitor. I'd like to have the zoom set to 200%. I've seen some very specific issues related to this question, but no general explanation. Could someone help me get started even if there's no optimal solution? I have a very high bandwidth connection. Which other settings would you recommend to have the best display quality possible?

iterations.description: Users are unable to easily locate or understand the existing resolution and desktop scaling settings for remote connections, particularly 'DesktopScaleFactor', which directly relates to 'zoom level'.

comments.author: VShawn
comments.snippet:
sometimes zooming just not work(but sometime it works) for me with mRemoteNG & 4K monitor, and it will blur

you can try **[censored]**, it will zoom on your 4k monitor as long as you set the zoom on local machine.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Users are unable to easily locate or understand the existing resolution and desktop scaling settings for remote connections, particularly 'DesktopScaleFactor', which directly relates to 'zoom level'.
Approach: Enhance the UI to make existing resolution and desktop scaling settings, especially 'DesktopScaleFactor', more prominent and understandable to users. This may involve renaming UI labels, reorganizing options, or adding tooltips/documentation links.
